products.name: Oil Control Mattifying Day Gel

concerns: sensitive to greasy or thick formulas

products.description: A lightweight gel-cream that instantly absorbs excess sebum. Keeps skin comfortable and shine-free through the day.
products.how_to_use: Use every morning after cleansing and toning, apply a thin layer over face, avoiding eye area.

products.name: Comfort Cream Sunscreen SPF 30
products.description: A moisturising sunscreen cream that cushions dry skin while protecting from UV rays. Leaves a soft, non-greasy finish.
products.how_to_use: Apply evenly on face and neck every morning after moisturiser, reapply if outdoors for long durations.

products.name: Hydrating Face Toner Mist
products.description: A fine facial mist that instantly refreshes and hydrates the skin. Can be used between skincare steps or over makeup.
products.how_to_use: Hold bottle 15–20 cm away and spritz evenly over face whenever skin feels tight or dull.
